title: Vintage USA porn: 'Boy 'napped!' 1975
tags:
Overview: Complicated relationships between men and lovers are explored in this vintage gay porn sex movie from Hand in Hand Studios. The story revolves around a hunky athlete of a wealthy background and his college roommate getting into sex when they are kidnapped, held for ransom, and fucked silly.

It is amazing how porn films fed off and reflected the zeitgeist - in this case the Patty Hearst kidnapping.
